zh.lifeSummary: Ellen Losbye於1595年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾。她於1614年11月2日與George W York在英國萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1668年在她的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ellen Losbye于1595年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾。她于1614年11月2日与George W York在英国萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1668年在她的家乡享年73岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Ellen Losbye was born in 1595, in Leicestershire, England. She married George W York on 2 November 1614, in Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1668, in her hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Ellen Losbye est née en 1595, à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé George W York le 2 novembre 1614, à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1668, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Ellen Losbye wurde 1595 in Leicestershire, England geboren. Sie hat am 2. November 1614 in Leicestershire, England George W York geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1668 im Alter von 73 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ellen Losbye è nata il nel 1595 nel Leicestershire, England. Lei sposato George W York il 2 novembre 1614, nel Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1668, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Losbyeは1595年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた。1614年11月2日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでGeorge W Yorkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1668年に故郷で73歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Losbye(은)는 1595년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1614년 11월 2일 영국 레이스스터실르에서 George W York(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1668년 그녀의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ellen Losbye nasceu em 1595, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com George W York em 2 de novembro de 1614, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1668, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Ellen Losbye родилась в 1595 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George W York 2 ноября 1614 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1668 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Ellen Losbye nació en 1595, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Se casó con George W York el 2 de noviembre de 1614, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1668, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
